title: Invocation is a tuple alias not a named struct, matching RFC 8620 JSON array wire format
description: Invocation is defined as type Invocation = (String, serde_json::Value, String). A named struct with derive(Serialize) would serialize as a JSON object, not a JSON array. RFC 8620 §3.2 requires invocations to be 3-element JSON arrays. The tuple alias serializes correctly by default. A future contributor wanting named fields would need a newtype with custom serialize implementations — the tuple is the correct low-friction choice here.
close_reason: Decision record — current design is correct, no change needed
